/bin/echo -e "COMMON_DIR = ..\nTARGET = mov-c\nC_SRCS = cpu-tests/mov-c.c\ninclude ../common.mk" > Makefile.mov-c
if make -f  Makefile.mov-c; then \
	printf "[%14s] \033[1;32mPASS\033[0m\n" mov-c >> .result; \
else \
	printf "[%14s] \033[1;31m***FAIL***\033[0m\n" mov-c >> .result; \
fi
